subcodes.title: Address to the children at Plaza Hotel in Chicago, 1912-05-05
subcodes.first_line: You are the children of whom His Holiness Christ has said, you are the denizens of the Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: شماها بفرموده حضرت مسیح اطفال ملکوتید و بفرمایش حضرت بهاءالله شمعهای عالم انسانی
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
